summary.platform: WordPress + Kiddino theme + Yoast SEO + Flying Press
top_findings: Zero canonical tags across the entire site
Zero meta descriptions on all 17 pages
Zero structured data — no LocalBusiness, JobPosting, or schema of any kind
Live test page (/test1/) indexed in Google via sitemap
12 Kiddino theme builder URLs in sitemaps; 55% of submitted URLs are junk or demo content
quick_wins: Add fetchpriority=high to hero image (30 min, direct LCP improvement)
Exclude Kiddino builder sitemaps in Yoast (30 min, removes 12 junk URLs)
Enable Open Graph in Yoast → Social → Facebook (30 min, fixes all social sharing)
Enable Yoast breadcrumbs (15 min, auto-generates BreadcrumbList site-wide)
Create /llms.txt (30 min, AI search visibility signal)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS enforced
Flying Press caching active
robots.txt correctly blocks /wp-admin/ and tracking parameters
Sitemap index correctly referenced in robots.txt

findings.title: Zero canonical tags site-wide
findings.description: No <link rel="canonical"> detected on any page audited. With dozens of near-duplicate pages (builder URLs, demo content, duplicate teacher/class/event pages), Google is guessing canonical URLs arbitrarily.
findings.recommendation: Verify Yoast SEO schema settings are not suppressing canonical output. Yoast should auto-generate canonicals — if missing, check for theme conflicts or enable under Yoast → Search Appearance → General → Schema.

findings.title: Test page /test1/ live and indexed
findings.description: /test1/ has H1 'test1', is listed in page-sitemap.xml (lastmod 2025-07-02), and has no noindex directive. Signals site neglect to Google.
findings.recommendation: Add noindex meta tag immediately and remove from sitemap. Consider deleting the page entirely.

findings.title: 12 Kiddino builder URLs in sitemaps
findings.description: kiddino_footer (5 URLs), kiddino_header (5 URLs), kiddino_tab_build (1), kiddino_off_build (1) are all in the sitemap index and render soft-duplicate homepage content.
findings.recommendation: Yoast → Search Appearance → Content Types → disable each Kiddino builder post type from sitemaps.

findings.title: Unremoved Kiddino demo content indexed
findings.description: 11 teacher pages (3 duplicate Katie Willmore with content/title mismatches), 13 class pages at /all-classs/ (5 drawing-painting duplicates, content/title mismatches), 4 event pages (3 Father's Day duplicates). All have identical lastmod 2025-02-27 — bulk import signature.
findings.recommendation: Delete all demo content. For genuine teacher profiles, keep one URL per teacher with 301 redirects from duplicates. Same for class and event pages.

findings.title: Contact form broken on /contact/
findings.description: The /contact/ page displays 'Contact form not found' — a broken CF7 or WPForms shortcode. Live conversion failure.
findings.recommendation: Restore the correct contact form shortcode or recreate the form in WPForms/CF7 and update the page.

findings.title: URL typos in production
findings.description: /menu-for-chilgren/ (typo: 'chilgren'), /all-classs/ (triple-s typo across 13 URLs), /wickliffe-3/ (draft artifact suffix)
findings.recommendation: 301 redirect /menu-for-chilgren/ → /menu-for-children/. Rename /wickliffe-3/ → /wickliffe/ with 301. The /all-classs/ typo is embedded in 13 URLs — fix when deleting demo content.

findings.title: No Open Graph tags
findings.description: Zero og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url detected on any page. All social sharing previews (Facebook, LinkedIn) are broken.
findings.recommendation: Enable in Yoast → Social → Facebook → Add Open Graph metadata. Also enable Twitter Card under Yoast → Social → X (Twitter).

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: UPK page cites verifiable SUTQ Gold credential and county context
Curriculum page references High-Scope, Piaget, Dewey, Vygotsky — strong factual depth
CACFP participation is a genuine authority signal
Director names and location contact info present on all pages
3 physical locations with full NAP data consistently listed

findings.title: Zero meta descriptions across all 17 pages
findings.description: Not a single page on the site has a meta description. Google writes its own SERP snippets for all pages, typically choosing unflattering body text.
findings.recommendation: Write 150–160 character meta descriptions for all 17 pages. Each should include: location/service keyword, a unique differentiator (SUTQ Gold, CACFP, High-Scope), and a CTA (Book a Tour, Learn More).

findings.title: 5 pages have no title tag
findings.description: Homepage (/), /curriculum/, /food-program-cacfp/, /meals/, and /jobs/ all have no title tag. Google generates its own, often using the H1 or site name only.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive title tags following the pattern: [Primary Keyword] | [Secondary Keyword] - Play Academy | [City, OH]

findings.title: E-E-A-T score: 27/100
findings.description: Critical for YMYL-adjacent childcare content. No About page (404), no staff bios with credentials, no Ohio ODJFS license numbers displayed, no privacy policy in navigation, copyright shows 2025 (current year 2026).
findings.recommendation: Create a 'Meet Our Team' page with director photos, credentials, years of experience. Display Ohio childcare license numbers. Add privacy policy to footer navigation.

findings.title: Severe keyword cannibalization across 4 clusters
findings.description: Homepage + 3 location pages all compete for 'childcare near me Cleveland'. /preschool/ and /upk-program/ compete for the same preschool queries. /food-program-cacfp/, /meals/, /menu-for-chilgren/ overlap completely on CACFP/nutrition queries.
findings.recommendation: Assign one primary query per page. Homepage owns 'childcare Cleveland OH'. Each location page owns '[city] childcare'. Consolidate or canonicalize the 3 food/nutrition pages.

findings.title: Same testimonial on 5+ pages
findings.description: Erica Lograsso testimonial appears verbatim on Wickliffe, Highland Heights, Parma Heights, Summer Camp, and Toddlers pages. Signals fabricated or non-location-specific reviews.
findings.recommendation: Source and display unique testimonials per location. Integrate Google Reviews widget for verified reviews. Consider AggregateRating schema once you have a verified review count.

findings.title: /menu-for-chilgren/ shows no actual menus
findings.description: The page is titled 'Menu for Children' and the H1 promises menus, but no actual meal tables, weekly menus, or nutritional information appear in the content. Pure intent mismatch.
findings.recommendation: After fixing the URL typo (301 redirect to /menu-for-children/), add actual weekly or monthly meal tables formatted as HTML tables, with CACFP compliance notes.

findings.title: Thin content on /food-program-cacfp/
findings.description: ~500–600 words, well below the 800-word service page floor. Missing: how CACFP reimbursement works for families, meal patterns per age group (infants vs toddlers vs school-age differ), links to USDA CACFP official resources.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 1,200+ words. Add FAQ section. Link to USDA CACFP page as an authoritative citation.

findings.title: No pricing page — highest-intent missing query
findings.description: 'Daycare prices Cleveland OH' and 'how much does daycare cost in Cleveland' are high-intent commercial queries with zero site coverage. Prospective parents researching cost find nothing and go to competitors.
findings.recommendation: Create a Pricing/Tuition page. Even a range or 'contact for pricing' page with enrollment details captures this intent.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Location pages have keyword-relevant H1s (Childcare in Wickliffe, etc.)
Program pages use keyword-relevant title tags (Infant Daycares Near Me, etc.)
Internal navigation covers all main service areas

findings.title: 'Near Me' in title tags on 3 pages
findings.description: /summer-camp/, /school-age/, /infants/ all include 'Near Me' in their title tags. Google ignores 'near me' as a ranking modifier in titles and it looks spammy to users in SERPs.
findings.recommendation: Replace 'Near Me' with the specific city: e.g., 'Kids Summer Camp Cleveland OH | Play Academy'

findings.title: // separator in title tags on 5+ pages
findings.description: Inconsistent separator usage — some pages use //, others use | or -. // is non-standard and looks unprofessional in SERPs.
findings.recommendation: Standardize on | or - as separator across all title tags.

findings.title: Generic H1 headings on functional pages
findings.description: /curriculum/ H1 is 'Curriculum', /contact/ H1 is 'Contact', /jobs/ H1 is 'Jobs' — missed keyword opportunities.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite to: 'High-Scope Childcare Curriculum — Play Academy Cleveland', 'Contact Play Academy Childcare — Cleveland, OH', 'Childcare Jobs in Cleveland OH | Play Academy'

findings.title: Image alt text: systemic failure site-wide
findings.description: Dominant alt text values: 'icon', 'teacher', 'about', empty strings, or raw filenames. Some images have keyword-stuffed alt text ('Best Daycares near me in Cleveland Ohio') which is the opposite problem.
findings.recommendation: Write descriptive alt text that accurately describes each image. Example: 'Preschool classroom at Play Academy Wickliffe' instead of 'icon' or 'Best Daycares near me in Cleveland Ohio'.

findings.title: No internal linking strategy
findings.description: Most pages link primarily to nav menu items. No contextual internal links from content body directing users from CACFP page to Meals page, from Curriculum page to program pages, etc.
findings.recommendation: Add 3–5 contextual internal links per page. Link location pages to their specific program pages. Link program pages to the contact/tour page.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: NAP data is consistently present in HTML across all pages
Multi-location structure exists — just needs to be expressed in schema

findings.title: Zero structured data across entire site
findings.description: No JSON-LD, microdata, or RDFa detected on any page. The site is invisible to Google's rich result systems. No Knowledge Panel eligibility, no local pack entity signals, no Google Jobs eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Implement in priority order: (1) ChildCare LocalBusiness for each location page, (2) Organization + WebSite on homepage, (3) JobPosting on /jobs/, (4) Enable Yoast breadcrumbs for BreadcrumbList. See findings/schema.md for complete JSON-LD code.

findings.title: No JobPosting schema — 9 positions invisible to Google Jobs
findings.description: The /jobs/ page lists 3 roles (Lead Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Floater) across 3 locations = 9 Google Jobs-eligible postings. None have JobPosting schema. Competitors with schema get free job listing visibility in Google Search.
findings.recommendation: Add JobPosting JSON-LD for each position at each location. Include baseSalary (required for top placement), validThrough, employmentType. See findings/schema.md for complete examples.

findings.title: Highland Heights ZIP discrepancy
findings.description: /jobs/ page shows Highland Heights ZIP as 44124; all other pages show 44143. Schema will lock in whichever value is used — verify against GBP listing before implementing.
findings.recommendation: Verify correct ZIP code against the Google Business Profile for Highland Heights and standardize across all pages and schema.

findings.title: No review/rating schema despite having testimonials
findings.description: Multiple pages display the Erica Lograsso testimonial. Not marked up with Review or AggregateRating schema — invisible to Google for star display in local pack results.
findings.recommendation: Once you have a verified review count from GBP, add AggregateRating to the ChildCare schema. Do not fabricate review counts.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: WebP format used for recent image uploads
Flying Press caching plugin active
HTTPS enforced

findings.title: Hero image missing fetchpriority and preload hint
findings.description: hero-2-1-2.webp (LCP candidate) has no fetchpriority='high' or <link rel='preload'> in <head>. Browser has no early signal to prioritize it, directly hurting LCP score.
findings.recommendation: Add to <head>: <link rel='preload' as='image' href='/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/hero-2-1-2.webp' fetchpriority='high'>

findings.title: YouTube iframe loads ~550 KB undeferred
findings.description: Standard YouTube embed (JI7EaRoccV4) appears without loading='lazy'. Loads ~550 KB of YouTube JavaScript on page parse, delaying Time to Interactive and inflating LCP.
findings.recommendation: Replace with lite-youtube-embed facade library or add loading='lazy' as minimum. The lite-YouTube approach defers all JS until user clicks play.

findings.title: Images missing width and height attributes
findings.description: No width/height attributes confirmed on images across audited pages. Missing dimensions cause Cumulative Layout Shift as images load and reflow content.
findings.recommendation: WordPress 5.5+ auto-adds dimensions for new uploads if the theme supports it. Check Kiddino theme compatibility. Add manually to existing images if needed.

findings.title: No preconnect hints for third-party origins
findings.description: No preconnect for YouTube (youtube.com, ytimg.com), chatbot CDN (cdn.glitch.global), or illions.com widget. Missing preconnect adds 200–600 ms on typical connections.
findings.recommendation: Add to <head>: <link rel='preconnect' href='https://www.youtube.com'> plus cdn.glitch.global and pub-files-live.illions.com

findings.title: PNG logo served on every page
findings.description: STIKER_Book_240973-2.png is the logo format. PNG is larger than WebP for logos.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP or use inline SVG for the logo. Update across all pages.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: AI crawlers not blocked (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended all allowed)
Curriculum page has citable factual content (High-Scope, Piaget, Perry Preschool Project)
SUTQ Gold rating is a verifiable, government-backed credential AI can cite
CACFP participation is a citable federal program affiliation
Consistent NAP data enables local entity disambiguation

findings.title: No /llms.txt file
findings.description: /llms.txt returns 404. This is the emerging standard for signaling how AI systems should access and cite your content (analogous to robots.txt for LLMs).
findings.recommendation: Create /llms.txt with structured facts: organization name, locations, programs, hours, credentials, sitemap URL. See findings/performance.md for a complete template.

findings.title: No About page (confirmed 404)
findings.description: AI systems check About pages first to understand organizational identity, mission, founding, and leadership. Without it, AI has no authoritative source for 'who is Play Academy?'
findings.recommendation: Create an About page covering: founding story, mission, owner/director credentials, years in operation, Ohio childcare license number, SUTQ Gold accreditation detail.

findings.title: No FAQ page (confirmed 404)
findings.description: AI Overviews and AI Mode heavily cite FAQ-structured content to answer common questions. Common parent queries ('What age does daycare start?', 'How much does daycare cost in Cleveland?') have no citable answers on this site.
findings.recommendation: Create a FAQ page with FAQPage schema targeting 8–12 high-frequency parent questions.

findings.title: Boilerplate teacher credentials on all profiles
findings.description: Every teacher profile shows identical 'MS/Mphil degree, PhD degree' text. This is Kiddino theme placeholder content — not real data. AI systems evaluating E-E-A-T will flag this as fabricated expertise.
findings.recommendation: Populate with real credentials or remove the credential field. This is also a trust signal failure for human visitors.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Recent uploads use WebP format
Hero image (hero-2-1-2.webp) is 135.5 KB — reasonable size

findings.title: Systemic alt text failure across all pages
findings.description: Most images use generic alt text ('icon', 'teacher', 'about') or are empty. Some have keyword-stuffed alt text ('Best Daycares near me in Cleveland Ohio'). Neither approach serves accessibility or image search.
findings.recommendation: Audit all images and write descriptive alt text that accurately describes image content. Example: 'Children doing art activities at Play Academy Parma Heights preschool classroom'

findings.title: JPG/JPEG images on location pages
findings.description: ridge-0_orig.jpeg and IMAGE-2025-04-29-143605.jpg found on /wickliffe-3/ — not converted to WebP. Filename 'ridge-0_orig' suggests unoptimized original upload.
findings.recommendation: Reprocess through WordPress media library with WebP conversion enabled, or use Flying Press's image optimization feature.

findings.title: Logo served as PNG
findings.description: STIKER_Book_240973-2.png is the logo — served on every page as PNG rather than WebP or SVG.
findings.recommendation: Convert to SVG (ideal for logos) or WebP.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Noindex /test1/ and remove from sitemap
Fix broken contact form on /contact/
Exclude Kiddino builder URLs from Yoast sitemaps
Delete duplicate teacher pages (Katie Willmore x3 etc.) with 301 redirects
Delete duplicate class pages (drawing-painting x5 etc.) with 301 redirects
Delete duplicate event pages (Father's Day x3) with 301 redirects
Replace boilerplate teacher credentials with real data or remove field
Add fetchpriority='high' and preload hint to hero image
301 redirect /menu-for-chilgren/ to /menu-for-children/

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Write meta descriptions for all 17 pages (150-160 chars each)
Write title tags for 5 pages missing them (/, /curriculum/, /food-program-cacfp/, /meals/, /jobs/)
Enable Open Graph in Yoast (Social → Facebook)
Verify and enable canonical tags in Yoast
Add ChildCare LocalBusiness JSON-LD to each of 3 location pages
Add Organization + WebSite JSON-LD to homepage
Add JobPosting JSON-LD for all 9 positions on /jobs/
Enable Yoast breadcrumbs (auto-generates BreadcrumbList)
Fix YouTube iframe — add loading='lazy' or lite-YouTube facade
Add width/height attributes to all images
Add preconnect hints for YouTube, chatbot CDN, illions.com

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Create About/Meet Our Team page with director bios and credentials
Create Pricing/Tuition page
Differentiate location pages with unique testimonials and local content
Add actual weekly menus to /menu-for-children/
Expand /food-program-cacfp/ from ~500 to 1,200+ words
Create FAQ page with FAQPage schema
Create /llms.txt AI guidance file
Consolidate /meals/, /menu-for-children/, /food-program-cacfp/ into hub-and-spoke
Fix title separators (// → |) site-wide
Remove 'Near Me' from title tags on /summer-camp/, /school-age/, /infants/

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Rename /wickliffe-3/ → /wickliffe/ with 301 redirect
Verify and fix Highland Heights ZIP (44124 vs 44143 discrepancy)
Add Google Maps embeds to /contact/ for all 3 locations
Build directory citations (Yelp, Care.com, Daycare.com, GreatSchools, Bing Places)
Convert PNG logo to WebP or SVG
Add font-display: swap to web font declarations
Add security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy)
Set up Google Search Console and submit sitemap_index.xml
Monitor Core Web Vitals in GSC after LCP and CLS fixes
Add review integration once GBP review count grows
Update footer copyright year (2025 → 2026)
